final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a political map of Argentina in Instagram story format.

Style/medium: flat political map illustration
Composition: full country map centered vertically, portrait orientation
Subject: political map of Argentina with all provinces delineated; province of Jujuy visually highlighted and standing out above the others
Scene/backdrop: clean, minimal background
Lighting/mood:
Color palette: distinct colors for each province; Jujuy uses a clearly contrasting highlight color to stand out from the rest
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim):
Constraints: 9:16 vertical format suitable for Instagram Stories
Avoid: 3D effects, photorealistic textures, decorative props unrelated to the map
